title: Talking about the weather
tagline: Cold, snow, dark - the small talk that oils every Finnish day.

lines.en: It is. This morning it was below freezing.
Is it going to rain tonight?
According to the forecast it'll snow.
I like it, though. You get to go skiing.
Haha, you're a real winter person.

lines.fi: Oon. Mut kohta on kesä, ei hätää.
lines.en: I am. But summer's soon, no worries.
Hopefully! It's so dark right now.
Yeah, but the daylight'll increase soon.
